guidance.en: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.es: Ingrese su nombre legal completo. Usted es la 'persona protegida'.
guidance.zh: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.vi: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.so: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.ti: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.am: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.ar: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.ht: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.ko: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.pt: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.ru: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.
guidance.tl: Enter your full legal name. You are the 'protected person' requesting the restraining order.

guidance.en: Select your relationship: married/domestic partners, formerly married, dating/formerly dating, parent of same child, cohabitant/former cohabitant, closely related by blood.
guidance.es: Seleccione su relación con la persona restringida.
guidance.zh: Select your relationship: married/domestic partners, formerly married, dating/formerly dating, parent of same child, cohabitant/former cohabitant, closely related by blood.
guidance.vi: Select your relationship: married/domestic partners, formerly married, dating/formerly dating, parent of same child, cohabitant/former cohabitant, closely related by blood.

common_errors.en: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211 to issue a DVRO.
common_errors.es: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.zh: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.vi: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.so: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.ti: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.am: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.ar: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.ht: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.ko: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.pt: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.ru: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.
common_errors.tl: The court must find a qualifying relationship under Family Code § 6211.

fields.field_label: Name of person to be restrained

guidance.en: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained. Include any known aliases.
guidance.es: Ingrese el nombre legal completo de la persona que desea restringir.
guidance.zh: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.vi: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.so: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.ti: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.am: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.ar: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.ht: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.ko: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.pt: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.ru: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.
guidance.tl: Enter the full legal name of the person you want restrained.

guidance.en: Enter the address of the person to be restrained. This is needed for service of process. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.es: Ingrese la dirección de la persona a restringir.
guidance.zh: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.vi: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.so: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.ti: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.am: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.ar: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.ht: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.ko: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.pt: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.ru: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.
guidance.tl: Enter the address. If unknown, write 'Unknown'.

guidance.en: Describe in detail what happened. Include: dates and times, specific acts of abuse (hitting, threatening, stalking, harassing, destroying property), injuries, weapons involved, witnesses. Be specific — the judge needs facts to grant the order.
guidance.es: Describa en detalle lo que sucedió. Incluya fechas, actos específicos de abuso, lesiones.
guidance.zh: Describe in detail what happened. Include dates, specific acts, injuries, weapons, witnesses.
guidance.vi: Describe in detail what happened. Include dates, specific acts, injuries, weapons, witnesses.

common_errors.en: Being too vague or general. The court needs specific incidents with dates and details.

tips.en: Start with the most recent incident, then describe the pattern. Include dates wherever possible.
tips.es: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.zh: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.vi: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.so: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.ti: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.am: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.ar: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.ht: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.ko: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.pt: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.ru: Start with the most recent incident.
tips.tl: Start with the most recent incident.

guidance.en: Check all that apply: no contact, no harassing, no stalking, no threatening, no destroying property, no disturbing the peace.
guidance.es: Marque todo lo que aplique: sin contacto, sin acoso, sin amenazas.

guidance.en: Enter the distance (in yards) you want the restrained person to stay away from you, your home, workplace, school, children's school. Common distances: 100 yards.
guidance.es: Ingrese la distancia que desea que la persona restringida se mantenga alejada.
guidance.zh: Enter the stay-away distance in yards.
guidance.vi: Enter the stay-away distance in yards.

guidance.en: If you share a residence, you can request the restrained person be ordered to move out.
guidance.es: Si comparten residencia, puede solicitar que la persona restringida se mude.
guidance.zh: If you share a residence, you can request a move-out order.
guidance.vi: If you share a residence, you can request a move-out order.

guidance.en: You can request temporary custody of children as part of the DVRO. If checked, also complete FL-311.
guidance.es: Puede solicitar custodia temporal de los hijos como parte de la orden.
guidance.zh: You can request temporary custody. If checked, also complete FL-311.
guidance.vi: You can request temporary custody. If checked, also complete FL-311.
guidance.so: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.ti: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.am: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.ar: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.ht: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.ko: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.pt: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.ru: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
guidance.tl: Request temporary custody if needed. Complete FL-311.
